title: LAZYDAYS ANNOUNCES JOHN NORTH AS NEW CEO
text: TAMPA, Fla. , July 19, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Lazydays Holdings Inc. (NasdaqCM: LAZY), has appointed John North as Chief Executive Officer and a member of the Board of Directors, effective September 6, 2022.

title: Copart: Online Automotive Auction Market Leader
text: We believe Copart's revenue growth at a 5-year projection of 14.4% could be supported by its solid market leadership in the online automotive market (37.7% market share) and scale against. Moreover, we expect its revenue growth to remain driven by its US segment (13.6%) which had a higher average revenue growth than its international segment (9.9%).
